# Freyr Technology AI

Freyr Technology AI is an AI infrastructure and model API service company. The website describes high-performance GPU infrastructure, text and image generation model access, API documentation, GPU solutions, bare metal leasing, deployment services, privacy information, and contact channels.

Key pages:

- Home: https://www.freyrtech.ai/
- Models: https://www.freyrtech.ai/models.html
- Pricing: https://www.freyrtech.ai/pricing.html
- API Docs: https://www.freyrtech.ai/api.html
- Solutions: https://www.freyrtech.ai/solutions.html
- Privacy Policy: https://www.freyrtech.ai/privacy.html
- Contact: https://www.freyrtech.ai/contact.html

Contact:

- Email: ContactUS@freyrtech.ai
- Phone: +65 89585382
- Address: U-Club Prudential Tower 30 Cecil Street Level #14-01 Prudential Tower, Singapore 049712

- Model catalog fallback: https://www.freyrtech.ai/assets/models.json
- Pricing fallback: https://www.freyrtech.ai/assets/pricing.json
